value: Owner decision 2026-07-14: Firebase/Firestore likely dropped. Responses + in-progress state go in Neon Postgres jsonb instead of Firestore. PRO-D scoring service is being rebuilt so scoring JSON can be pulled on demand (their API: https://registry.scalar.com/share/apis/ArKTB9rSUaIZZosDGORZr — relevant to E1/E2). Open question: object storage for branding assets + legacy PDFs (Firebase Storage's other job) — DO Spaces is the natural candidate. Affects A4, C2, K2.
